hooks.command: python3 -c "import json, sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); path=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); blocked=['.env', 'credentials', 'secrets', '.git/']; result=any(p in path for p in blocked); sys.exit(2 if result else 0)"

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read file_path; [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' && command -v npx >/dev/null && npx prettier --write "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true; }
